fun plan(candidatePlanPath: String, implementationSpecPath: String, workspacePath: String): Verdict {
    val contextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerification = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val candidatePlan = readFile(candidatePlanPath)
    val implementationSpec = readFile(implementationSpecPath)
    val repositoryFiles = listFiles(workspacePath)
    val relevantPaths = identifyRelevantPaths(implementationSpec, candidatePlan, repoIndex, repositoryFiles)
    val relevantSource = readFiles(relevantPaths)
    val specRequirements = extractSpecRequirements(implementationSpec)
    val planClaims = extractPlanClaims(candidatePlan)
    val sourceFacts = extractSourceFacts(relevantSource, contextReadme, contextIndex, maintenance, engineeringPrinciples)
    val coverage = comparePlanToSpec(planClaims, specRequirements, sourceFacts)
    val infraRisks = assessInfrastructureRisks(planClaims, sourceFacts)
    val verificationFindings = runSelfVerificationChecklist(coverage, infraRisks, selfVerification)
    val verdict = makePlanImplementsSpecVerdict(coverage, infraRisks, verificationFindings)
    return verdict
}
